key_points.text: Revenue growth accelerating dramatically: fiscal 2026 full-year revenue of $215.9 billion, up 65% from $130.5 billion in fiscal 2025, with first quarter fiscal 2027 revenue up 85% year-over-year to $81.6 billion

Compute Networking segment revenue surged 88% year-over-year in Q1 FY2027 to $74.6 billion, driven by Blackwell systems ramp and strong demand for InfiniBand, Spectrum-X Ethernet, and NVLink solutions

Profitability surged with gross margin of 74.9% in Q1 FY2027 (vs 60.5% in Q1 FY2026) and net income margin of 71.5% (vs 42.6%), benefiting from lower inventory provisions after prior year's $4.5 billion H20 excess inventory charge

citation.quote: Gross profit 74.9% ... 60.5% ... Net income 71.5% ... 42.6% ... lower inventory provisions, primarily due to the prior year's $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory and purchase obligations

key_points.text: Operating income growth explosive: Compute Networking segment operating income up 142% year-over-year in Q1 FY2027 to $53.3 billion from $22.1 billion, with overall operating margin of 65.6% vs 49.0% prior year
Edge Computing grew 29% year-over-year to $6.4 billion in Q1 FY2027, driven by robust Blackwell workstation demand despite softer consumer PC demand

citation.quote: Edge Computing revenue for the first quarter was $6.4 billion, up 29% from a year ago

key_points.text: Massive market opportunity with accelerated computing platform enabling AI, data processing, and HPC applications across multiple verticals, with NVIDIA powering over 78% of global TOP500 supercomputers

citation.quote: NVIDIA powers over 78% of the supercomputers on the global TOP500 list

key_points.text: Platform strength reinforced by 7.5 million developers worldwide using CUDA and ecosystem expansion through 6,000 supported applications and partnerships with major cloud providers

citation.quote: There are over 7.5 million developers worldwide using CUDA and our other software tools ... With support for 6,000 applications

key_points.text: Fiscal 2026 full-year Compute Networking revenue grew 67% to $193.5 billion with Data Center computing up 59% driven by Blackwell platform and Data Center networking up 142%

citation.quote: Compute Networking $ 193,479 ... $ 116,193 ... 67 % ... Revenue from Data Center computing grew 59% ... Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142%
